author: lu_pinto
content: Hi I was looking into the EIP-8037 implementation in besu and notice something that looks weird to me. The worst case for EIP-7702 is charged to intrinsic state gas but then after processing them, whatever was overcharged is given back via reservoir. I feel this is unfair as it misallocates funds from compute to state. I wrote a hack md to illustrate the case: https://hackmd.io/@yLS7PKbzTHyB7H_THgC9Cg/ByN9odTgMg
